economic_notes: Council owns 100% of Pehdzeh Ki Contractors Ltd (construction/contracting), Petanea Corporation (inactive), and Pehdzeh Ki Development Corporation (inactive). Also holds 14.27% limited partnership interest in Deh Cho Helicopters Regional Limited Partnership. Council operates a landfill. COVID-19 declared global pandemic March 11, 2020 noted as subsequent event.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on three bases: (1) financial statements of three 100%-owned subsidiaries (Pehdzeh Ki Contractors Ltd, Petanea Corporation, Pehdzeh Ki Development Corporation) not available — unable to verify equity adjustments; (2) completeness of donation/fundraising revenue cannot be verified; (3) landfill closure and post-closure costs not recorded due to uncertainty of responsibility. No budget was prepared for the year. Restricted deposits show a negative balance of -$8 due to bank charges. OSR is negative because total revenue net of government transfers includes deferred contribution movements which distort the figure. Province set to NT (Northwest Territories). Fiscal year is 2020 not 2024.
